name: anime-workbench-cli
description: LingJing AI Anime Workbench CLI monorepo with standalone CLI, opencli frontend, shared core, and skills

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check install.mjs && node --check packages/awb-core/commands.js && node --check packages/awb-core/standalone.js && node --check packages/awb-cli/bin/awb.js && node scripts/validate-skill-meta.mjs
